name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M50202, M41436 Coffee Check, M50202 Monogram Small Hobo. A super mini cute bag, a small hobo in the vintage style. If you want to go for a retro look, this is the right choice. It looks great on. The monogram hobo is rare, and it holds a lot. Capacity is super 👍🏻. Dimensions: 23 × 13 × 14 cm.
